---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for the RE Pipeline
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief summary of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions considered.

## Implementation Details
If you have thoughts on implementation, describe them here.

## Impact
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Improvement to existing feature

## Stage Affected
Which RE Pipeline stage does this affect?
- [ ] Stage 1: DECONSTRUCT
- [ ] Stage 2: PATTERN DISTILL
- [ ] Stage 3: MUTATE
- [ ] Stage 4: REBUILD
- [ ] Cross-stage / Multiple stages
- [ ] Governance

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the feature request.
